mapper.select: select id, file_name, file_path, create_time, status from t_db_copy

select id, file_name, file_path, create_time, status from t_db_copy
create_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
mapper.insert: insert into t_db_copy(file_name, file_path, create_time, status) values (#{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{createTime}, #{status})
mapper.select: select id, file_name, file_path, create_time, status from t_db_copy where id = #{id} and status = 1
